# Sync Inclusions Configuration
# Files and directories listed here will be synced FROM the public repository TO the private repository
#
# Format:
#   - One file or directory path per line (relative to repository root)
#   - Lines starting with # are comments
#   - Empty lines are ignored
#   - Use forward slashes (/) for paths
#   - Directories will sync all contents recursively
#
# Examples:
#   README.md
#   docs/
#   scripts/setup.sh
#   src/utils/

# Documentation files
README.md
LICENSE
CONTRIBUTING.md
lead/
slurm/
scripts/
docs/
